title: File size limit too small
excerpt: Hi, I tried to add a File column to one of our Forms in order to let people attach their videos, but even the smallest iPhone video I could find was deemed “File size too large”… Is there a way to increase the file size …

posts.author: mildorviolon (Jean-Francois McDonald)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I tried to add a File column to one of our Forms in order to let people attach their videos, but even the smallest iPhone video I could find was deemed “File size too large”… Is there a way to increase the file size limit, or is that not an issue with another plan like Pro ? Needs a solution…

posts.author: jonaslitton (Jonas Litton)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a BIG issue for my company. We rely on larger audio files to send back and forth with clients, and 500MB is rarely enough to cut it. We transitioned over from ClickUp for several reasons, but now miss the 2GB file size limit we had with them. Hoping this gets increased on Monday very soon.
